eaip:DocumentMeta.eaip:Title: Enterprise AI Integration Protocol — Technical Specification
eaip:DocumentMeta.eaip:Abstract: This specification defines the mandatory transport, identity, and state-management requirements for all components conforming to the Enterprise AI Integration Protocol (EAIP). Sections cover the gRPC transport mandate, SPIFFE/SPIRE identity architecture, and the Recursive Context Envelope (RCE) for distributed state propagation.

eaip:ChangeLog.eaip:Entry: Finalized RCE nesting depth limit; mandated SVID rotation ≤24h.
Added gRPC connection-pool health-probe interval spec.

eaip:Protocol.eaip:Name: gRPC
eaip:Protocol.eaip:Rationale: All EAIP service-to-service communication MUST use gRPC over HTTP/2. REST and WebSocket transports are PROHIBITED for inter-component channels. Exception: external edge ingress MAY terminate at HTTP/1.1 and proxy inward via gRPC-Web gateway.

eaip:ContextSlots.eaip:Slot: You are a helpful enterprise assistant. Adhere to EAIP §3.3.

eaip:ProtocolFlows.eaip:SequenceDiagram:
sequenceDiagram %% EAIP v2.4.1 — Full request lifecycle with SPIFFE/SPIRE identity and RCE propagation %% Participants participant Client as Client\nService participant Gateway as Inference\nGateway participant SPIRE as SPIRE\nAgent participant Retrieval as Retrieval\nService participant OPA as OPA\nPolicyd
%% ── Phase 1: mTLS Handshake / SVID Exchange ──────────────────────────── rect rgb(245, 245, 240) Note over Client,SPIRE: §2 Identity — SVID Acquisition (SPIFFE Workload API) Client->>SPIRE: FetchX509SVID() SPIRE-->>Client: X509-SVID { spiffeId, cert, privateKey, bundle } Gateway->>SPIRE: FetchX509SVID() SPIRE-->>Gateway: X509-SVID { spiffeId, cert, privateKey, bundle } end
%% ── Phase 2: gRPC Channel Establishment ──────────────────────────────── rect rgb(240, 245, 245) Note over Client,Gateway: §1 Transport — gRPC/mTLS Channel Client->>Gateway: TLS 1.3 ClientHello (SPIFFE SVID) Gateway-->>Client: TLS 1.3 ServerHello + mTLS Certificate Client->>Gateway: HTTP/2 SETTINGS (max_frame=16384, initial_window=65535) Gateway-->>Client: HTTP/2 SETTINGS_ACK end
%% ── Phase 3: RCE Construction & Policy Check ─────────────────────────── Note over Client,OPA: §3 RCE — Envelope Construction + AuthZ Client->>Client: Construct RCE(depth=0, envelopeId, state, slots[0..1]) Client->>OPA: CheckPolicy(spiffeId=client, action=inference, rce.metadata) OPA-->>Client: PolicyDecision { allow: true, obligations: [] }
%% ── Phase 4: Primary Inference Request ──────────────────────────────── Client->>Gateway: InferenceRequest(rce=RCE_depth0) activate Gateway
%% ── Phase 5: Retrieval Sub-call with Nested RCE ──────────────────────── Gateway->>Gateway: Construct child RCE(depth=1, parentId=RCE_depth0.id) Gateway->>Retrieval: RetrievalQuery(rce=RCE_depth1) activate Retrieval Retrieval->>OPA: CheckPolicy(spiffeId=gateway, action=retrieve) OPA-->>Retrieval: PolicyDecision { allow: true } Retrieval-->>Gateway: RetrievalResponse(chunks, rce=RCE_depth1_response) deactivate Retrieval
%% ── Phase 6: RCE Merge & Response ───────────────────────────────────── Gateway->>Gateway: Merge RCE_depth1 into RCE_depth0 (slots[2]=ToolResult) Gateway-->>Client: InferenceResponse(result, rce=RCE_depth0_updated) deactivate Gateway
%% ── Phase 7: SVID Rotation ───────────────────────────────────────────── rect rgb(250, 242, 240) Note over Client,SPIRE: §2.3 SVID Rotation (async, ≤24h TTL) Client->>SPIRE: FetchX509SVID() [rotation before TTL expiry] SPIRE-->>Client: renewed X509-SVID end

eaip:Error.eaip:Description: SVID missing, expired, or failed mTLS verification.
eaip:Error.eaip:Remediation: Re-fetch SVID from SPIRE agent; verify trust bundle.

eaip:Error.eaip:Description: OPA policy evaluation denied the request.
eaip:Error.eaip:Remediation: Review OPA bundle policy for service SpiffeId.
Flatten context or consolidate child envelopes.

eaip:Error.eaip:Description: Child RCE TokenBudget exceeds parent TokenBudget.
RCE slot count exceeds maximum (32 slots per envelope).
eaip:Error.eaip:Remediation: Archive stale slots or reduce context payload size.

eaip:Error.eaip:Description: gRPC channel health probe failed; connection pool exhausted.
eaip:Error.eaip:Remediation: Increase MaxConnections or reduce request concurrency.

eaip:ConformanceProfile.eaip:Requirement: All inter-component communication uses gRPC over HTTP/2.
All gRPC channels use mutual TLS 1.3 with SPIFFE SVIDs as certificates.
SVIDs MUST be rotated before TTL expiry; maximum TTL is 24 hours.
Every component MUST possess a valid SPIFFE ID under trust domain spiffe://eaip.example.org.
Every gRPC request MUST carry exactly one root RCE at depth 0.
RCE nesting depth SHALL NOT exceed 4 levels.
A child RCE TokenBudget SHALL NOT exceed its parent's remaining budget.
RCE payloads exceeding 64 KiB MUST apply zstd compression at level ≥ 3.
